title: Quiz: QGAN Applications and Benchmarking
description: Test your understanding of QGAN applications in various domains and benchmarking methods

questions.question: What metric is used to measure the quality of quantum state generation?
questions.explanation: Fidelity measures the overlap between the target and generated quantum states. A fidelity of 1 indicates perfect state preparation.

questions.question: What is a Born machine?

options.text: A quantum model that outputs probability distributions via |ψ|²
A measurement device for quantum states

questions.explanation: A Born machine generates probability distributions through the Born rule: measuring a quantum state |ψ⟩ produces outcomes with probabilities |ψ_i|². QGANs can be viewed as adversarially trained Born machines.

questions.question: Why are QGANs potentially useful for financial modeling?

options.text: They are faster than classical computers
They can capture complex correlations and tail behaviors in distributions

questions.explanation: QGANs may capture complex distribution structures, correlations, and heavy-tailed behaviors that are challenging for classical models, potentially improving risk metrics like VaR.

questions.question: What does the SWAP test estimate in state generation benchmarking?

options.text: The inner product |⟨ψ1|ψ2⟩|² between two states

questions.explanation: The SWAP test is a quantum algorithm that estimates the overlap (inner product magnitude squared) between two quantum states, useful for comparing generated and target states.

questions.question: KL divergence is symmetric: D_KL(P||Q) = D_KL(Q||P).
questions.explanation: False. KL divergence is asymmetric: D_KL(P||Q) ≠ D_KL(Q||P) in general. This is why symmetric metrics like Total Variation or Hellinger distance are sometimes preferred.

questions.question: What should be tracked when benchmarking QGAN quantum resources?

options.text: Qubits, gates, circuit depth, and parameter count

questions.explanation: Fair quantum benchmarking requires tracking multiple resources: number of qubits, total gates, circuit depth, and parameter count, as each affects hardware requirements and trainability.

questions.question: What indicates good convergence in QGAN training?
questions.explanation: At Nash equilibrium, the generator produces samples indistinguishable from real data, so the discriminator outputs 0.5 for both (random guessing), indicating convergence.

questions.question: Which are valid QGAN application domains? (Select all that apply)

options.text: Financial risk modeling and option pricing
Drug discovery via molecular property generation

questions.explanation: QGANs have applications in: (a) preparing quantum states for algorithms, (b) modeling financial distributions, (c) generating molecular properties, and (d) creating trial wavefunctions for variational quantum eigensolvers.
